title: Slightly Vanilla
description: A vibrant 16x16 pack that stays faithful to Minecraft's art style
body: ![Minecraft Slightly Vanilla Texture Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44414b24a228bd2bba495d97326b7eac8714767d.png) ## ⛏️ About Slightly vanilla is an ongoing work in progress, focused on creating a more cohesive and vibrant look for Minecraft. It includes hundreds of updated textures that add to the game while staying faithful to the original style, bringing older textures more in line with Minecraft's newer visuals. I’ve been a fan of Minecraft for a long time, and this pack is my way of showing that love while keeping the game feeling familiar, cozy, and timeless with some minor tweaks. ## Fixing textures ![Minecraft Armor Leggings Texture Fix Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e370414fdf35be88e25b9cec3be153f82c57b6af.png) (and making them more vibrant) ## Updating old textures ![Minecraft Carrot Retexture Forgiven](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/325c95a50b89549d9851dccf8f57db785774bfbc.png) ## Tweaks (no mods needed) ![Minecraft Rocket duration textures Forgiven](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb419461d5d49ced5412a7a03df6483ab645aafe.png) (Like firework textures based on duration) ## Socials
